curated_routing_card_real_scores.description: a completed routing_card from the real discovery tool (post-DATA-008b) with curated options carrying real 0–1 compositeScore (~0.82) + per-dimension scores + mileage, surfaced against live Convex

curated_routing_card_centroid_only.description: a curated option whose overviewGeometry encodes a single centroid point (no multi-point polyline)

would_fail_if: score rendered as raw 82 with no % and not on 0–1 scale
curated card identical to planned card

steps: surface a curated routing_card via the real discovery tool against live Convex for a route with compositeScore ~0.82
read the curated card's score text/bars and name/mileage

must_observe: composite rendered as '82%' or '82/100' or a bar filled ~82% (Math.round(score*100))
the real road name string and a mileage value (e.g. '· 14mi')
curated card uses the road-variant icon / composite badge (distinct from start→end planned layout)
must_not_observe: a raw '82' with no scale context
a start→end planned-trip card layout for the curated option

scenario.verification_service: live Convex dev (curated routing_card via discoverCuratedRoutes/listCuratedRoutes) via @testing-library/react-native

would_fail_if: onViewOnMap missing on the curated branch → stays in chat mode

steps: render the plan view in chat mode with an earlier curated routing_card
assert setSelectedRouteId + setDisplayedRoutePlanId received the option/plan ids and onViewOnMap fired (chatMode false)

must_observe: setDisplayedRoutePlanId called with the card's routePlanId
setSelectedRouteId called with the curated option id
chatMode === false after press (returned to map)
must_not_observe: still in chat mode after press

would_fail_if: no camera move for a single-point route

steps: select a centroid-only curated option (geometry decodes to 1 coordinate)
assert doFit takes the single-point branch

must_observe: setCameraPosition called with the centroid coordinates and zoom: 12
must_not_observe: an exception thrown for a single-point geometry
